Event: Magic Well - December 2023
Event Date: 01/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: A182


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Magic Well Ranger Chest
Stone of Madness

Triggers: Once in a while

Protective Magic
Launches magic orbs at all units in a small radius around the unit.
- If the orb hits an ally, it casts restoration on them. It removes a random debuff and restores 150000 health. It also increases damage by 50%, increases health by 25%, and reduces incoming damage by 30% for 5 sec.
- If the orb hits an enemy, it deals 300000 magic damage and casts silence on them. The target of the orb can't use weapon, armor, or artifact abilities for 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet
